goal: Goal 3C TOMICS-HAF 2025-2C promotion and cross-dataset gate outputs with single-dataset promotion block, New Phytologist readiness matrix, and paper-safe claim register

acceptance_criteria: Promotion and cross-dataset gates execute and produce outputs; single-dataset promotion remains blocked unless criteria truly pass; shipped TOMICS incumbent unchanged; claim register and readiness matrix exist; tests/private runs/ruff/diff checks pass
validation_commands: targeted Goal 3C tests, Goal 3B.5 regression subset, private promotion and cross-dataset gate runs, ruff, git diff --check, full pytest if fast
evidence_required: validation output or documented validation gap

constraints: Follow the nearest active AGENTS.md before any write.
Do not bypass the implementation gate; work on gate prerequisites when it is blocked.
Keep every implementation pass bounded and verification-backed.
Stop when the goal is done, blocked by missing information, or max_iterations is reached.

completion_evidence.reviewer: no blocking or medium findings remain
completion_evidence.head_source: Use `git rev-parse HEAD` or `gh pr view 315 --json headRefOid` for the current PR head; tracked RAH state does not hardcode its containing commit hash.
